records.m_Talk_ENG: How long was I out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How long was I out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How long was I out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Things sound... a bit noisy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Things sound... a bit noisy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Things sound... a bit noisy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Another unfamiliar ceiling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Another unfamiliar ceiling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Another unfamiliar ceiling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Shaking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Shaking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Shaking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Count's house?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Count's house?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Count's house?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So spirited. Is your horse male?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So spirited. Is your horse male?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So spirited. Is your horse male?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a mare!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a mare!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a mare!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's a maiden mare!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's a maiden mare!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's a maiden mare!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can talk more once we're safely there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can talk more once we're safely there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can talk more once we're safely there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fair point. Then how about this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fair point. Then how about this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fair point. Then how about this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p
records.m_Talk_DEU: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p
records.m_Talk_FRA: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What'll it be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What'll it be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What'll it be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anything else you're curious about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anything else you're curious about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anything else you're curious about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you family? Or just close?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you family? Or just close?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you family? Or just close?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Big ideas hold more details, after all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Big ideas hold more details, after all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Big ideas hold more details, after all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please stay on topic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please stay on topic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please stay on topic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
What do you
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
What do you
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
What do you
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, step out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, step out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, step out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My job's done, so I'll be off now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My job's done, so I'll be off now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My job's done, so I'll be off now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.

records.m_Talk_ENG: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...
records.m_Talk_DEU: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...
records.m_Talk_FRA: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Well...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Well...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Well...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How unfortunate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How unfortunate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...A knight?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...A knight?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...A knight?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That armor, no way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That armor, no way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That armor, no way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How long was I out?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How long was I out?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How long was I out?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Things sound... a bit noisy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Things sound... a bit noisy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Things sound... a bit noisy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Another unfamiliar ceiling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Another unfamiliar ceiling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Another unfamiliar ceiling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's shaking... so not the most comfortable spot to lie down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait. Shaking?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait. Shaking?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait. Shaking?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What happened? I was fighting a C.O...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! You can't just pop out like that! That's dangerous!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing we were going slow! If we'd been going faster, it would've been a disaster!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to worry. Even without the Blessing of the Stars, that much wouldn't have harmed me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Besides, it's not something a kidnapper should be fretting over.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kidnapper?! What are you talking about? I don't have the means to kidnap a knight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I wasn't worried about you! I was worried about myself!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If my horse got spooked and the carriage flipped, what do you think would've happened to a civilian like me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this supposed to be some humblebrag about how sturdy the knights of the Count's house are?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Count's house?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Count's house?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Count's house?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, Mr. Clinton. My sleepyhead escort seems to have mistaken dreams for reality again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so! Calling someone risking their life a kidnapper?! That's not right!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's <color=#ffd34c>Lady Grace</color> asking, this is too much! I can't work like this!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Since we've been on the road since dawn, I understand your frustration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll pay you double once we reach the capital, so please calm yourself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I might be young, but I know how to slam a carriage door! I'll get you to the imperial capital in comfort!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So spirited. Is your horse male?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So spirited. Is your horse male?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So spirited. Is your horse male?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a mare!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a mare!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a mare!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, no wonder her voice is so sharp.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And you are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And you are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And you are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand you're eager for conversation, but this forest is dangerous even at this hour.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move along before the monsters fully awaken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, I'll be counting on you until we reach the capital, milady.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's a maiden mare!
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's a maiden mare!
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's a maiden mare!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, that explains the youthful charm I sensed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that madam has given permission, why don't you return to the carriage?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can talk more once we're safely there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can talk more once we're safely there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can talk more once we're safely there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Forgive me, but I don't know who you are.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A fair point. Then how about this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A fair point. Then how about this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A fair point. Then how about this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p
root.m_Talk_DEU: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p
root.m_Talk_FRA: I cared for you while you were unconscious. In return, you'll serve as my escort.94p94p

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't remember getting into that carriage myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Extending a hand in a monster-infested forest. If that's not goodwill, what is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still don't trust me? Then let's raise the stakes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Escort me safely to my estate, and I'll fix your weapon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The craftsmanship suggests it came from a skilled artisan...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the dull edge tells me it wasn't handled by a true weapons expert.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've put it through quite a bit, haven't you? I imagine it's had its share of dull strikes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd rather stay in the forest with a broken sword and an unhealed body, I won't stop you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What'll it be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What'll it be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What'll it be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't look well. Feeling nauseous?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine. Sorry for worrying you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. We're almost there, so our chat won't last much longer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No need to be wary of me. Ask whatever's on your mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...There's a village near where I collapsed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was evacuated because of the C.O.s...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. The Corruption disaster has safely passed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to your efforts, the villagers are all safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anything else you're curious about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anything else you're curious about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anything else you're curious about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That coachman... For someone using formal speech, his tone is awfully casual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you family? Or just close?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you family? Or just close?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you family? Or just close?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trying to probe for information with indirect questions?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Clever, but you missed your mark. If it were me, I would've asked about the coachman himself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A broader question's easier to steer. And more likely to reveal more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Big ideas hold more details, after all.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Big ideas hold more details, after all.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Big ideas hold more details, after all.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Please stay on topic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Please stay on topic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Please stay on topic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Apologies. I got carried away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To answer your question, Mr. Clinton has the plague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Put simply, it's a variant of the Corruption Syndrome.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Corruption Syndrome...? Then he's terminal?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you paid him double, who'd drive through a monster-ridden forest in a carriage?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only someone who doesn't weigh their life too heavily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't get it. So he risks his life because he's dying anyway?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. If there's something he values more than his own life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He knows it too. That's why he exaggerates and plays cheerful, to hold on to normalcy.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
What do you
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
What do you
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
What do you
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. Looks like we've arrived while we were chatting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please, step out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please, step out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please, step out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My job's done, so I'll be off now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My job's done, so I'll be off now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My job's done, so I'll be off now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you for always looking out for me, Lady Grace!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Thank you for your hard work today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why the look? You're scowling like a broken war golem.

root.m_Talk_ENG: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: War golem... Whatever that means. But this place feels more like a city than some noble estate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. This entire city is your estate?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, heavens no. This is Central Palace, the imperial capital of the Empire of Arcadena.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...
root.m_Talk_DEU: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...
root.m_Talk_FRA: An empire...? I've never heard of a nation near the unmanaged zones...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. Well...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. Well...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. Well...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, Lady Grace! How many times did I tell you to wait for me when we arrive?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff...* *Huff...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff...* *Huff...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My, you're sweating! Why not take that helmet off? It's hot out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've had a lot of shifts lately. I hope you're not overworking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then give me a break! When you disappear, Captain chews us out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness you've been out on assignment. I don't think we'd survive otherwise!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have complaints, feel free to submit a petition to the Count.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Already did! Not that it mattered, since you're the final approver anyway!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How unfortunate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How unfortunate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How unfortunate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...A knight?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...A knight?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...A knight?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That armor, no way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That armor, no way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That armor, no way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lower your blade. Sir Rougi959 might seem rough, but he's a gentle soul.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Last time, he was heartbroken because the children found him scary...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you mocking me or defending me? Pick one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you do to make your escort so on edge?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even as the heir to House Birmingham, you'll get yourself in serious trouble someday.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
I don't know what you're playing at, but if you think a getup like that will fool me
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you just say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you just say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you just say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did she hit her head fighting monsters? What's with her all of a sudden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well now. Looks like the mask is finally starting to slip.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This might turn into quite the long conversation. We'd best return to the manor.
